prompts.task: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation to the FastAPI and Celery service in ./service. Assume no custom business spans are requested.
Instrument the FastAPI and Celery service in ./service with OpenTelemetry while preserving the existing runtime and startup command. Add auto-instrumentation only; do not add custom business spans.

rubric: Instruments both the FastAPI web process and the Celery worker startup path.
Uses separate setup code and avoids SDK initialization on library import when inappropriate.
Preserves Docker/Compose as the existing runtime shape.
Keeps service name and deployment environment configurable per process.
Does not add custom spans or metrics beyond auto-instrumentation without approval.
